struct Customer {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
    discount_rate: f64,
    credit_limit: f64,
}

impl Customer {
    fn apply_discount(&self, amount: f64) -> f64 {
        amount * (1.0 - self.discount_rate)
    }
}

struct Order {
    customer_id: u64,
    product_id: u64,
    quantity: u32,
    total: f64,
}

fn calculate_shipping(weight: f64, distance: f64) -> f64 {
    weight * distance * 0.01
}
